source_observations.evidence: OP Stack specs describe OptimismPortal as the primary L1/L2 deposit and withdrawal interface and state that withdrawals are checked against output roots declared valid by the fault proof system.
Withdrawal flow specs describe prove and finalize steps through OptimismPortal, including proof verification, challenge period, and replay-prevention finalization.
A closed public issue documents funds sent directly to a portal implementation as a known edge case; future candidates must not repackage this without a distinct new bypass or impact.
OptimismPortal2.sol develop snapshot has 790 lines and local SHA-256 B541EF7166AF8CD177F64324571E642D9C511AB8C7441268B096954C5F3E464F.

local_invariant_review_plan.name: Pause gate covers prove and finalize
local_invariant_review_plan.local_question: Can any withdrawal proof or finalization path bypass `_assertNotPaused()`?
local_invariant_review_plan.duplicate_gate_notes: Not a claim unless bypass is concrete and not a privileged-only/admin scenario.
local_invariant_review_plan.quality_gate_notes: Requires exact call path, affected state, and local reproduction plan.

local_invariant_review_plan.name: Unsafe targets remain blocked
local_invariant_review_plan.local_question: Can a withdrawal reach the portal itself, ETHLockbox, or an equivalent unsafe target through an alternate path?
local_invariant_review_plan.duplicate_gate_notes: Must avoid the documented direct-implementation stranded-funds issue unless a new bypass exists.
local_invariant_review_plan.quality_gate_notes: Needs target classification and proof of direct protocol impact.

local_invariant_review_plan.name: Dispute game eligibility is complete
local_invariant_review_plan.local_question: Are all invalid dispute-game states rejected both during proof and finalization readiness checks?
local_invariant_review_plan.duplicate_gate_notes: Must clear op-dispute-mon and proof-of-whale exclusions before promotion.
local_invariant_review_plan.quality_gate_notes: Needs exact game state matrix and local fixture plan.

local_invariant_review_plan.name: Output-root and withdrawal inclusion binding
local_invariant_review_plan.local_question: Can output-root proof data and withdrawal storage proof data become inconsistent without reverting?
local_invariant_review_plan.duplicate_gate_notes: Must avoid upstream/known fault-proof issue overlap.
local_invariant_review_plan.quality_gate_notes: Needs local proof data fixture and expected revert/success assertions.

local_invariant_review_plan.name: Proof submitter isolation
local_invariant_review_plan.local_question: Can one proof submitter reset, block, or finalize another submitter's valid withdrawal proof unexpectedly?
local_invariant_review_plan.duplicate_gate_notes: Check existing multiple-proof design rationale before any claim.

local_invariant_review_plan.name: Replay protection before external call
local_invariant_review_plan.local_question: Is `finalizedWithdrawals` always set before external target execution, and can any revert/estimation path unwind assumptions?
local_invariant_review_plan.duplicate_gate_notes: Do not claim generic reentrancy without a concrete bypass of replay and l2Sender guards.

local_invariant_review_plan.name: l2Sender guard and reset
local_invariant_review_plan.local_question: Can `l2Sender` remain non-default or be observed incorrectly across nested/failing finalization paths?
local_invariant_review_plan.duplicate_gate_notes: Privileged or target-contract-only behavior is not enough without direct in-scope impact.
local_invariant_review_plan.quality_gate_notes: Needs success/failure target matrix and state assertions.

local_invariant_review_plan.name: ETHLockbox accounting on failed withdrawal target call
local_invariant_review_plan.local_question: When ETHLockbox mode is enabled, is ETH unlocked, used, and re-locked correctly across failed calls?
local_invariant_review_plan.duplicate_gate_notes: Must distinguish direct accounting bug from chain/operator configuration issue.
local_invariant_review_plan.quality_gate_notes: Needs local accounting invariant and failure-path fixture plan.

local_invariant_review_plan.name: Deposit gas and calldata bounds
local_invariant_review_plan.local_question: Do minimum gas, calldata length, creation target, and address aliasing checks prevent unpaid or misattributed L2 resource usage?
local_invariant_review_plan.duplicate_gate_notes: Large data/gas griefing is a documented exclusion unless a distinct new impact exists.

local_invariant_review_plan.name: Custom gas token value restriction
local_invariant_review_plan.local_question: Are ETH value paths fully blocked when custom gas token mode is active?
local_invariant_review_plan.duplicate_gate_notes: Configuration-only claims are weak unless they show direct protocol code impact.
local_invariant_review_plan.quality_gate_notes: Needs mode matrix and value-flow proof plan.

duplicate_and_quality_status.reason: This packet selects an asset and review plan only; it does not allege a vulnerability or provide a runnable PoC.

next_action.instruction: Review exactly one invariant group locally, beginning with opi-007 or opi-008, and produce a memo plus runnable local fixture plan. Do not execute fork tests, live target tests, or submissions.
